title: ASCII liquid field
description: A canvas glyph field that swirls like ink in water, the same atmosphere used across the site's liquid banner.

title: Hand-drawn notebook marks
description: SVG circles, asterisks, and margin notes that draw themselves in, editorial personality without sticker clutter.

title: AXON - Accessible Design system
description: A test of how far AI can take accessible design systems, built with a fully AI-assisted workflow from Figma Make to Claude to code.

title: Building Adaptive Teams
description: A microlearning course for team leads navigating change, built on the idea that the conditions matter as much as the content.
